heading: Radiotelephone requirement
label: 1203 Radiotelephone requirement
notes: References in TextPresidential Proclamation 5928 of , referred to in subsec. (b), is set out as a note under , Public Lands.December 27, 1988section 1331 of Title 43

children.heading: Vessel coverage; exchange of navigational information
children.label: a Vessel coverage; exchange of navigational information

children.text: every power-driven vessel of twenty meters or over in length while navigating;

every vessel of one hundred gross tons as measured under , or an alternate tonnage measured under section 14302 of that title as prescribed by the Secretary under section 14104 of that title, and upward carrying one or more passengers for hire while navigating;section 14502 of title 46
every towing vessel of twenty-six feet or over in length while navigating; and
every dredge and floating plant engaged in or near a channel or fairway in operations likely to restrict or affect navigation of other vessels—

children.heading: Vessels upon navigable waters of United States inside high seas lines
children.label: b Vessels upon navigable waters of United States inside high seas lines
children.text: The radiotelephone required by subsection (a) shall be carried on board the described vessels, dredges, and floating plants upon the navigable waters of the United States, which includes all waters of the territorial sea of the United States as described in Presidential Proclamation 5928 of .December 27, 1988
